title: Render Tweaks+
description: This mod is aimed at optimization and convenience in the game, and allows you to disable the rendering of shaking, grass, etc.
body:
![rtp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59bc704ffcf963553f020cbf6a06b30cce575d0e.png)
<center>
 
![fabic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00cafc081fda6a47102728961fb5f7ce091c244b_0.webp)
  
</center>

![ServerComp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a22f398df024ad1ef8ead3e04f024f3a757a10.png)
- **our mod does not contain any banned features on popular servers. But if you get banned - contact support in our discord**
  
![About FunVisuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/092817c302dbdead90aa1c02539b71966ad25da5.png)

- **It increases your FPS by disabling the rendering of the elements you choose.**
- **It can be useful in PvP.**
- **It will not take up too much screen space.**

---------------------------------------------------

- **It allows you to disable various annoying textures in Minecraft, making the game more comfortable.**

<center>
  
![functions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14258e8ff1dcecdfc02bae994f92142958960ec3.png)

</center>

 -------------------------------------------------


            
![instr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636220897371a74542707612cfbaaf5f2c094a0d.png)

```
RU/EN
Если вы нашли баг, то немедленно обратитесь в поддержку и сообщите о нём.
If you find a bug, please contact support immediately and report it.
```

- **Press B to open the GUI**
- **If you have turned off the grass renderer, please re-enter the world.**
